title: Codex adapter implementation
objective: Implement a Codex adapter path that can call codex exec when it is installed, while keeping tests independent of Codex availability.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Adapter checks for codex binary and fails gracefully if unavailable.
Adapter builds a deterministic prompt from task-packet.json and AGENTS.md.
Adapter writes artifacts to the standard run directory.
Smoke test does not require Codex, but a manual test command is documented.

koObjective: task packet을 Codex CLI/환경에 전달하고 결과를 artifact로 회수하는 adapter를 구현한다.

koGuide.요약: 이 작업은 Codex가 Dev Container 안에서 자동 구현할 수 있도록 설계된 단계별 task packet입니다.
